No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a graduate-level program providing advanced technical skills in cybersecurity and machine learning, directly supporting Targets 4.3 (tertiary education) and 4.4 (relevant skills for employment).

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced skills in cybersecurity and machine learning, contributing to technological upgrading and innovation (Target 8.2) and high-value job creation.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on cybersecurity and advanced information systems directly enhances technological innovation (Target 9.5) and supports resilient digital infrastructure (Target 9.1).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Cybersecurity skills are crucial for protecting urban digital infrastructure and systems (e.g., intrusion detection), contributing to community resilience against cyber threats (Target 11.b).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on cybersecurity directly builds capacity to combat cybercrime and terrorism (Target 16.a) and strengthens institutions against illicit activities (Targets 16.4, 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Advanced IT education fosters knowledge sharing on science and technology (Target 17.6) and builds capacity in using information and communications technology (Target 17.8).
